rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. VICTOR J. MARTINO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Compel Defendant'S Responses, Without Objection, To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogaroies-General, Set One, Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, 2) Deem Admissions, And 3) Request For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday September 18, 2015, line 6. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide responses without objections to Form Interrogatories and Requests for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions granted in the amount of $660. = (501/REQ)
